entries.name: payment-reconcile-nightly
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:00 UTC: per active provider polls provider intent list (last 24h + all in-flight) + reconciles drift between our records + provider records. Findings above 0 fire PaymentReconcileDriftNotification.

entries.name: payment-expire-stale-intents
entries.purpose: Nightly 01:00 UTC: marks intents in non-terminal status for > 24h as 'cancelled' with cancellation_reason='expired'. Signals abandoned checkouts. Best-effort provider-side cleanup dispatched.

entries.name: payment-purge-expired-data
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 05:00 UTC: applies the per-entity retention windows. Payments > 7y (or 10y Enterprise) hard-deleted (with financial-record archive first). Payment intents > 90d hard-deleted. Payment disputes > 7y (10y Enterprise) hard-deleted. Payment methods soft-deleted > 90d hard-purged.

entries.name: payment-sync-method-expiry
entries.purpose: Weekly Monday 06:00 UTC: flags cards expiring in 30 + 7 days + hard-expires cards past their expiry. Fires PaymentMethodExpiringNotification (30d + 7d out) + PaymentMethodExpired (post-expiry).

entries.name: payment-notify-dispute-evidence-due
entries.purpose: Every hour: scans payment_disputes for evidence_due_by within the next 3 days AND evidence_submitted_at IS NULL. Fires NotifyDisputeEvidenceDueJob per matching row. Debounced per (dispute) to fire at most once per 3-day window.

entries.name: payment-detect-high-failure-rate
entries.purpose: Every 15 min: computes per-provider capture failure rate over the last 15 min window. If > 10% failed AND > 10 total attempts: fires PaymentProviderCircuitBreakerOpenedNotification (if not already open). Debounced: at most 1 notification per (tenant, provider) per hour.

entries.name: payment-half-open-circuit-probes
entries.purpose: Every 10 min: sweep payment_provider_configs where circuit_breaker_open_until <= now() AND is still marked open. Transitions to HALF_OPEN + dispatches a probe payment. Safety net for cases where the delayed enqueue was lost (crashed worker, queue restart).

entries.name: payment-monthly-provider-health-report
entries.purpose: Monthly 07:00 UTC on the 1st: computes per-tenant per-provider metrics (capture success rate, average latency, dispute rate, chargeback rate) + emails the tenant admin. Enterprise tier only.
